/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH3 ISS CPROB PROB 2 Y PJ 11 D/CTS 11/WS/X WARRANTLESSSEARCH ORDER WILL EXPIRE 06-14-21,/SAORD/SA4:SAKS FIFTH AVENUE AT 384 POST STREET, SF/ /VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD:FINES AND FEES STAYED/RESTR/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING CONDITION TERMINATED AND GPS DEVICE REMOVED/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/

/CAL TS PRELIMINARY HEARING/X  THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPAINT TO ADD COUNT 3, PC 602(M), A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/IBARRA/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/MISDRED1: 002/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:RICHARD SHIKMAN/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:07-16-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/CTORD:DEFENDANT CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES OF SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING OFFICE WITHOUT PRIOR APPROVAL OF THE COURT/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA4:SAKS FIFTH AVE AT 384 POST STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO,/SAORD/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 DAY/DOP/
